in_progress_tasks.name: Author Vigil Capture Shortcut in Shortcuts.app
in_progress_tasks.progress: Shortcut built on Mac. Share-sheet registration works. Auth header bug fixed. Two open bugs: (1) server returned 'content required' on share-sheet invocation; (2) Ask for Input note field would not accept text input on macOS. User chose to defer and revisit later.

remaining_tasks.name: Export .shortcut file + copy iCloud share link

blockers.description: Ask for Input note dialog rejects text entry on macOS Shortcuts. Likely Input Type != Text, or Default Answer carries a magic variable, or the tiny macOS dialog needs a click-into-field before typing.
blockers.workaround: Either fix Ask for Input (Input Type = Text, Default Answer empty, click the field before typing) OR remove the note prompt entirely and set note = empty Text action. Ripping the prompt is the fastest unblock.

blockers.description: Even after note is fixed, unresolved: server logged 'content required' on a previous share-sheet run. Need response-body Show Alert right after Get Contents of URL to see what server actually returns on the 'uploaded' success branch — id check may be lying.
blockers.workaround: Insert Show Alert on Contents of URL after Action 25; run via Safari share sheet; screenshot alert.

human_actions_pending.action: When resuming: (a) fix or remove Ask for Input note prompt, (b) add Show Alert on Contents of URL after Action 25, (c) run via Safari share sheet with a note, (d) screenshot both the note-prompt behavior and the server response alert.
human_actions_pending.context: Task 1 can't complete until the Shortcut posts successfully and a thought lands in the Vigil PWA under the same account as the API key.

decisions.decision: Pivoted URL-vs-text branch from 'Shortcut Input is URL' to 'Count of URLs from Input > 0'
decisions.rationale: macOS Shortcuts does not expose type comparison for Shortcut Input magic variable; only has value / does not have value. Get URLs from Input normalizes regardless of input source.
User initially typed PWA URL. Fixed to API host.

decisions.decision: Response-handling If uses Dictionary Value (key=id) has any value
decisions.rationale: macOS Shortcuts may not expose Status Code on this version. id presence in parsed dictionary is a reliable success proxy — but needs verification via response-body alert, since 'uploaded' notification fired without a thought appearing in PWA.

decisions.decision: Defer phase 85 — user paused 2026-04-15 to move on to other work
decisions.rationale: Two stacked Shortcuts.app bugs (note-input blocked + silent upload failure) need live device debugging; not worth blocking v3.1 close on.

next_action: DEFERRED. When resuming phase 85: load this HANDOFF, then (1) fix Ask for Input note prompt or remove it, (2) add Show Alert on Contents of URL after Action 25, (3) re-test via Safari share sheet, (4) verify the thought appears in Vigil PWA under the API key's account. Until then, do not treat 85 as complete.
context_notes: Phase 85 is a human-driven Shortcuts.app authoring task. Shortcut exists, runs, hits real API, shows a success notification — but nothing lands in Vigil UI, and the note-input dialog refuses text. Two bugs unresolved. User deferred 2026-04-15.
